creator: hunreal@gmail.com
text:
I am installed 3Ware 9650SE-8LPML with WD 500G*7 SATA II hard disk, raid 6.
If heavy disk IO, twa got error about this,
twa0: INFO: (0x04: 0x0001): Controller reset occurred: resets=1
twa0: INFO: (0x16: 0x1107): Controller reset done!:  
After this message appear many time, the system hang.
I already upgraded the RAID adapter firmware uo lastest 9.4.2 code set, but not help.

How-To-Repeat: Heavy disk read/write IO.
